open.description: Drawer visibility in overlay mode (use `v-model:open`); closes on outside click.

permanent.description: Renders in place as part of the layout instead of a fixed overlay.

reduce.description: Collapses the drawer to a 50px Discord-style icon rail.

hoverExpand.description: Expands the reduced rail while hovered.

right.description: Docks the drawer to the right edge.

width.description: Drawer width (px or any CSS size).

order.description: Stacking order inside an <f-layout> — lower sits outer. Default 1 keeps the navbar (0) full-width on top; set 0 for a full-height sidebar.

inverseCorner.description: Draw a concave (negative-radius) fillet at the top-right so the sidebar flows into the navbar.

island.description: Float the drawer as an island — a margin on every side plus full rounding.

islandMargin.description: Gap around the drawer when island is set (px or any CSS length).

update:modelValue.description: Emitted when an item is activated.

update:open.description: Emitted when the overlay drawer opens or closes.

header.description: Content below the logo (e.g. a user card).
